title: GitHub organization audit event
description: One organization-scoped audit event delivered via webhook (X-GitHub-Event family). Payload is the canonicalized subset of fields the platform evaluator depends on; the full GitHub delivery body is stored in the ledger payload column at ingest time.

event_type.description: Value of the X-GitHub-Event delivery header, e.g. repository, member, organization, push, branch_protection_rule.

action.description: Per-event action discriminator (created, deleted, edited, member_added, etc.).

actor.description: GitHub login of the user or app that triggered the event.

repo.description: Repository full_name (org/name) when the event is repo-scoped; omitted for org-only events.

delivery_id.description: GitHub X-GitHub-Delivery UUID — also used directly as the record's idempotency_key.
